examples: A cool breeze made the heat bearable.
She was the only thing that made life bearable.
BAA and the government think that because aircraft are getting quieter and cleaner the extra flights will be bearable.
He was charming and quick, with a vanity made bearable by his genuine affection for people.
Mrs Jones, 58, said the Macmillan nurses had made dealing with her family's illness more bearable.
